race.description: Sky Racing Qtis Two-Year-Old Mdn Plate
race.comment: Tricky race to assess with a few of these facing the starter for the first time. Of the raced brigade PALMANOVA (13) went down by a narrow margin at Warwick Farm when resuming and will have derived a stack of benefit with that run now under the belt. Looks very well-placed against this line-up and maps ideally for this from gate four. Rates the testing material. DOUBLE COOL (11) wasn't too far away in G2 company at the latest outing and will appreciate this drop back in company here. Among the leading contenders. RUN LIKE A GIRL (14) has been thereabouts in both outings this time in work and may earn some minor money. DRIVE TO ZOUVIVE (12) is on debut but has shown ability at the trials and any market confidence must be respected.
